title: Minimalist GUI (Mods Support)
description: A professional 1.20.1 interface overhaul. Minimalist, clean, and optimized for deep mod integration. Redefining the modern Minecraft aesthetic.
body:
Minimalist GUI: Modern Interface Design

A clean, distraction-free UI overhaul for Minecraft 1.20.1.

🚀 Essential Visual Enhancements

For the best experience and to fix engine-level GUI rendering limitations, I highly recommend these mods:

• Translucency Fix
Mandatory for correct alpha-blending. Fixes vanilla bugs where semi-transparent UI elements render incorrectly.

• ReBlured
Adds a sleek Gaussian blur to the background, increasing contrast and focus on the minimalist menus.

• GUI Tween
Provides smooth interpolation and modern animations for all interface transitions.

🛠️ Supported Mods (Out of the box)

Built-in support for the most popular technical and magic mods:

  • AppleSkin
  • AttributesLib
  • Automobility
  • Backpacked
  • Botania
  • Bountiful
  • Brewin' and Chewin'
  • Clayworks
  • Corpse
  • Cosmetic Armor
  • Curios API
  • Easy Magic
  • Etched
  • Exposure
  • Farmer's Delight
  • Furnish
  • Hexerei W.I.P
  • Inventory HUD+
  • Inventory Profiles Next
  • Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
  • JEI
  • Macaw's Furnitures
  • MultiBeds
  • No Chat Reports
  • Parcool
  • Quark
  • Small Ships
  • Storage Drawers
  • Supplementaries
  • VC Gliders
  • Waystones
  • Woodworks
  • Xaero's Better PvP

🖼️ Preview Gallery

Minimalist GUI is in active development. Found a missing texture for your favorite mod? Open an issue on GitHub!
